Home / Services / Lawn Care

Lawn Care

Comprehensive lawn care services for a healthy, vibrant Raleigh lawn.

Maintaining a lush, green lawn in Raleigh's climate requires more than just mowing. Two Brothers Landscaping provides complete lawn care services designed to combat common issues like Piedmont clay soil compaction, fungal diseases, and weed infestations. We offer fertilization programs tailored to the specific needs of your grass type, aeration to improve drainage and nutrient absorption, and overseeding to thicken your lawn and prevent weed growth. Our team also provides expert advice on watering practices to ensure your lawn thrives, even during the hot summer months. Regular mowing, edging, and blowing are included to keep your property looking its best. We use professional-grade equipment and environmentally conscious products to deliver exceptional results while minimizing our impact on the environment. Let us take the hassle out of lawn care so you can enjoy a beautiful, healthy lawn year-round.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Lawn assessment and soil testing
  2. 02 Step 2: Customized fertilization and weed control program
  3. 03 Step 3: Aeration and overseeding as needed
  4. 04 Step 4: Regular mowing, edging, and blowing

Benefits

  • Healthier, greener lawn
  • Reduced weed growth
  • Improved drought resistance
  • Enhanced curb appeal

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I fertilize my lawn in Raleigh?

We recommend fertilizing your lawn 4-6 times per year, depending on the grass type and soil conditions. Our customized fertilization programs are designed to provide the optimal nutrients at the right time of year.

What is aeration and why is it important?

Aeration involves creating small holes in the soil to improve air circulation, water drainage, and nutrient absorption. This is especially important in Raleigh due to our heavy clay soil, which can become compacted over time.

Do you use environmentally friendly products?

Yes, we are committed to using environmentally conscious products whenever possible. We offer organic fertilization options and prioritize sustainable lawn care practices.
